import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/staff/Dashboard.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/Dashboard.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { useNavigate } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-router.js?v=d6d2548b";
import {
  FileText,
  Bell,
  BookOpen,
  Clock,
  AlertCircle,
  CheckCircle,
  Eye,
  Star,
  TrendingUp,
  Award
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { UnifiedDocumentViewerModal } from "/src/app/components/UnifiedDocumentViewerModal.tsx";
import { mockDocuments } from "/src/app/data/documents.ts";
import { useApp } from "/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx";
const STAFF_SECTOR = "aged-care";
export default function StaffDashboard() {
  _s();
  const { addAuditLog } = useApp();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const filteredBySector = mockDocuments.filter(
    (doc) => doc.sector === STAFF_SECTOR || doc.sector === "universal"
  );
  const recentDocuments = filteredBySector.filter((d) => d.lastAccessed).sort((a, b) => new Date(b.lastAccessed || 0).getTime() - new Date(a.lastAccessed || 0).getTime()).slice(0, 5);
  const mostUsedDocuments = filteredBySector.filter((d) => d.accessCount && d.accessCount > 0).sort((a, b) => (b.accessCount || 0) - (a.accessCount || 0)).slice(0, 5);
  const assignedDocuments = filteredBySector.filter((d) => d.assignedDate).slice(0, 5);
  const acknowledgeDocuments = filteredBySector.filter(
    (d) => d.requiresAcknowledgement && d.userStatus !== "acknowledged"
  );
  const [selectedDocument, setSelectedDocument] = useState(null);
  const [showDocumentModal, setShowDocumentModal] = useState(false);
  const handleOpenDocument = (doc) => {
    setSelectedDocument(doc);
    setShowDocumentModal(true);
    addAuditLog({
      action: "Document Opened",
      details: `Opened document: ${doc.title}`
    });
  };
  const handleAcknowledgeDocument = (documentId, signature) => {
    addAuditLog({
      action: "Document Acknowledged",
      details: `Acknowledged document: ${selectedDocument?.title}. Signature: ${signature}`
    });
    alert("✅ Document acknowledged successfully!");
  };
  const handleDownloadDocument = (doc) => {
    addAuditLog({
      action: "Document Downloaded",
      details: `Downloaded document: ${doc.title}`
    });
    alert(`📥 Downloading: ${doc.title}.pdf`);
  };
  const stats = [
    {
      label: "Assigned Documents",
      value: assignedDocuments.length,
      icon: FileText,
      color: "text-teal-400",
      bgColor: "bg-teal-500/10",
      link: "/staff/document-suite"
    },
    {
      label: "Pending Acknowledgements",
      value: acknowledgeDocuments.length,
      icon: Bell,
      color: "text-red-400",
      bgColor: "bg-red-500/10",
      link: "/staff/document-suite"
    },
    {
      label: "Recently Accessed",
      value: recentDocuments.length,
      icon: Clock,
      color: "text-purple-400",
      bgColor: "bg-purple-500/10",
      link: "/staff/document-suite"
    },
    {
      label: "Most Used",
      value: mostUsedDocuments.length,
      icon: Star,
      color: "text-amber-400",
      bgColor: "bg-amber-500/10",
      link: "/staff/document-suite"
    }
  ];
